Account Settings

Manage your security preferences and account status.

{/* Security Section */}

Security & Password

Ensure your account is using a strong password and has 2FA enabled.

Update Password It is recommended to change your password every 6 months.

Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)

Add an additional layer of security to your account.

{/* Sessions Section */}

Active Sessions

See where you are currently logged in.

Danger Zone

Irreversible actions related to your account.

Delete Account Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.
